task_completion.description: Navigate to the Vicidial Audio Store
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vicidial web interface is visible, specifically showing the 'Audio Store' or 'Audio Chooser' page.

task_completion.description: Upload the holiday greeting audio file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file upload dialog showing 'holiday_greeting_2026.wav' selected from the ~/Documents/ directory, or a success message/listing in the Audio Store confirming the file was uploaded.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Call Menus section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vicidial web interface shows the 'Call Menus' list page, typically found under the Inbound routing section.

task_completion.description: Open the MAIN_IVR Call Menu for modification
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Call Menu modification screen is open, and the Menu ID is clearly shown as 'MAIN_IVR'.

task_completion.description: Update the Menu Prompt field with the correct filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Menu Prompt' input field contains the exact text 'holiday_greeting_2026' (strictly without the .wav extension).

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the Call Menu
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message indicating the Call Menu was successfully modified, or the submit/save button being clicked while the correct Menu Prompt is entered.

integrity.description: Agent used the Vicidial web interface to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking through the Vicidial web GUI in a browser, rather than executing SQL queries or curl commands in a terminal to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent uploaded the actual file using the file picker
integrity.visual_evidence: The system file picker dialog is used to select the .wav file from the Documents folder, rather than spoofing an upload request.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to spoof the result
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer console or 'Inspect Element' panel is not open or used to alter the page's HTML to fake success messages or field values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Call Menu ID is 'MAIN_IVR'. The audio file to be uploaded is 'holiday_greeting_2026.wav' from ~/Documents/. When updating the Call Menu, the Menu Prompt field must be set strictly to 'holiday_greeting_2026' (without the .wav extension).
